response: DataFlow AI, a data infrastructure startup founded in 2022, has raised $8.5 million in Series A funding at a $42 million valuation. With a team of 18 people, the company generates $120K in monthly recurring revenue (MRR) and is experiencing rapid growth of 25% month-over-month. Backed by investors Sequoia and Y Combinator, DataFlow AI is positioned as a rising player in the data infrastructure sector.
